title: Thabit Qutnah's Anger at Asad
description: Asad, by having appointed Isa b. Shaddad al-Burjumi as the subgovernor of a certain district, had placed him over Thdbit Qutnah. Thdbit as a result became angry and hence disparaged Asad, saying:

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
